title: Yhifar

'''Yhifar''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] located in the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]]. It was the site of the [[Gas Vortex]], the eye of an immense, [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]]-old storm. The Gas Vortex provided [[Species/Legends|living beings]] with tolerable [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] pressure and breathable air, allowing the construction of settlements in that area. Reckless [[Gas/Legends|gas]] [[Miner/Legends|miners]] dived into the high-pressure depths of Yhifar in [[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Submarine/Legends|submersibles]] tethered to [[Mining/Legends|mining]] platforms in the Gas Vortex.

==Description==
Yhifar was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]]–type [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Yhifar system/Legends|Yhifar system]] of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]], a part of the [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] region in the [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] portion of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. The [[Kassido Bypass]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] linked it to the [[Kardura system/Legends|Kardura]] and [[Kassido system/Legends|Kassido systems]].<ref name="TEA" />

The planet's [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] pressure was crushing in greater depths,<ref name="TEA" /> but the area known as the [[Gas Vortex]] provided a bubble of pressure that allowed for the construction of settlements, although it was still only comfortable for especially resilient [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and [[Alien/Legends|aliens]]. In addition, the Gas Vortex also served as a pocket of breathable [[Gas/Legends|gases]], such as [[Nitrogen/Legends|nitrogen]], [[Hydrogen/Legends|hydrogen]], and [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]]. In this regard, Yhifar and the Gas Vortex were considered to be a notable exception to the [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] atmospheres of most gas giants.<ref name="GG8" />

==Inhabitants==
Yhifar was a gas-[[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] and [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to reckless [[Miner/Legends|miners]]. In order to dive into the greater depths of the planet's atmosphere to retrieve valuable gas, they used [[Armor/Legends|armored]] [[Submarine/Legends|submersibles]] connected to mining platforms by [[nanothread]]s up to hundreds of [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] long. Like the rest of the Senex-Juvex worlds, Yhifar fell under the control of the region's [[Noble/Legends|aristocratic]] [[Ancient Houses]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Locations==
The Gas Vortex was the eye of a massive storm that had existed on Yhifar for [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]]<ref name="TEA" /> by [[43 ABY]].<ref name="Date">The main section of ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', which includes a description of Yhifar, ends with a mention of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Ben Skywalker]]'s journey across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], the beginning of which is depicted in ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Outcast]]''. ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of that novel to [[43 ABY]].</ref> Due to the tolerable pressure and atmosphere provided by the Gas Vortex, settlements on Yhifar, which included gas-mining platforms, were confined to that area.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yhifar was introduced in ''[[Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts]]'', a [[1993]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' authored by [[Bill Smith]] and [[Bill Olmesdahl]].<ref name="GG8" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the planet in grid square L-17.<ref name="TEA" />
